title: task
description: python/src/lichen/sim/chaos.py:117 - LossRule stores loss decisions in _loss_cache keyed by transmission UUID. Each transmission gets a unique UUID, but the cache is never cleared. Over a long-running simulation with many transmissions, this accumulates unbounded entries (~100 bytes each). Fix: Either clear cache periodically, use an LRU cache with bounded size, or clear entries when transmissions complete.
